sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: article title here
feed.summary: brief 2-3 sentence summary of the article

feed.title: MetLife (NYSE:MET) Price Target Raised to $94.00 at Wells Fargo & Company
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has increased MetLife's (NYSE:MET) price target from $92.00 to $94.00, maintaining an "overweight" rating and suggesting a 15.69% potential upside. Several other analysts also issued reports, with a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating and an average target price of $95.73. MetLife reported strong Q3 earnings, surpassing analyst estimates, and institutional investors hold a significant portion of its stock.

feed.title: Patient Dies After Taking Pfizer’s Drug for Blood Disorder
feed.summary: A patient participating in an open-label extension study for Pfizer Inc.'s hemophilia drug, Hympavzi, died on December 14, 2025, after experiencing a stroke and brain bleeding. This incident marks a setback for Pfizer in the treatment of blood disorders, as reported by the European Haemophilia Consortium. Hympavzi is approved to treat hemophilia, a condition that impairs blood clotting.

feed.title: Levi & Korsinsky Announces an Investigation on Behalf of Vistagen Therapeutics, Inc. (VTGN) Shareholders Who May Have Been Affected by Fraud
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky has initiated an investigation into Vistagen Therapeutics, Inc. (VTGN) regarding potential violations of federal securities laws. This investigation follows a significant 81% drop in VTGN's stock price after the company announced that its PALISADE-3 study for social anxiety disorder failed to meet its primary efficacy endpoint. The firm is seeking to provide additional information to affected shareholders.

feed.title: CarMax, Inc. (KMX) Shareholders Get Answers in Latest SueWallSt Podcast
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has released a podcast detailing a class action securities lawsuit filed on behalf of CarMax, Inc. (NYSE:KMX) investors. The lawsuit alleges that CarMax's growth prospects were recklessly overstated between June 20, 2025, and November 5, 2025, due to a temporary benefit from customers buying cars in anticipation of tariffs. Shareholders who experienced losses are encouraged to contact Levi & Korsinsky for more information.

feed.title: Form 424B2 JPMORGAN CHASE & CO
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC has filed a Form 424B2 for Callable Contingent Interest Notes linked to the Nasdaq-100 Technology Sector Index, Russell 2000 Index, and S&P 500 Index, due December 24, 2030. These notes offer contingent interest payments if each index is above 70% of its initial value, but investors risk principal loss if any index falls below its trigger value. The notes are fully and unconditionally guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co.

feed.title: BMO downgrades Brown & Brown as talent competition clouds growth outlook
feed.summary: BMO Capital Markets downgraded insurance broker Brown & Brown to Market Perform, citing intensifying competition for insurance talent, particularly from private equity-backed rivals. This competition is expected to weigh on the broker’s organic growth over the next several years, leading BMO to cut its organic growth forecasts for 2026 and 2027. Despite the downgrade, BMO acknowledged that increased compensation costs from talent wars could partially offset revenue hits and that the shares are trading below historical levels.

feed.title: Construction begins on Wells Fargo bank in Valley Ranch Town Center
feed.summary: Construction has commenced on a new Wells Fargo location within Valley Ranch Town Center in New Caney, Texas. The bank, founded in 1852, offers a wide range of personal, business, investment, and corporate banking services. This new branch is anticipated to open in May 2026.

feed.title: Northern Trust stock hits all-time high at $140.77 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Northern Trust Corporation's stock has reached an all-time high of $140.77, reflecting a significant 35.61% increase over the past year due to strong performance and investor confidence. The company has also issued $1.25 billion in new debt securities, made key leadership appointments in its Asset Servicing and Wealth Management divisions, and reduced its prime rate. These strategic moves and expansions underscore Northern Trust's resilience in the financial services market.

feed.title: Regeneron stock reaches 52-week high at $791.00
feed.summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals Inc. (REGN) stock has reached a new 52-week high of $791.00, reflecting strong investor confidence and a "GREAT" financial health score from InvestingPro. The company's stock has seen a 9.59% increase over the past year and a 52.66% surge in the last six months, supported by management's aggressive share buyback program. Recent analyst updates show mixed sentiments with some raising price targets due to growth in products like Dupixent and strategic collaborations, while others remain cautious regarding risk/reward scenarios.

feed.title: GE stock reaches 52-week high at 316.88 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: GE stock has reached a 52-week high of $316.88, marking an 84.24% increase over the past year, driven by strong performance in GE Aerospace and strategic partnerships. This milestone reflects significant investor confidence and the company's robust market position, with a market capitalization of $333.67 billion. Recent developments include a quarterly dividend announcement, major engine supply deals with Saudia Group and Emirates, and a positive rating initiation from Susquehanna.

feed.title: Union Pacific, Norfolk Southern move forward with merger
feed.summary: Union Pacific Corp. and Norfolk Southern Corp. have filed an application with the US Surface Transportation Board seeking approval to merge, aiming to create the country's first transcontinental railroad. The merger, targeting an early 2027 closure, seeks to improve freight service by eliminating interchange delays and expanding rail solutions across 43 states. While it could offer benefits like single-line service for grain shippers, concerns about reduced competition also exist.

feed.title: NYSE Content Advisory: Pre-Market Update + S&P 500 Comes Off Third-Straight Winning Session
feed.summary: The New York Stock Exchange provides a daily pre-market update, highlighting the S&P 500's third consecutive winning session, led by AI and big tech stocks. The "Santa Claus Rally" is set to begin, with the S&P 500 up over 16% year-to-date, as investors also digest a Q3 Real GDP report showing the U.S. economy grew by 4.3% year-over-year.

feed.title: Beyond Botox: AbbVie’s push for broader gains in neurotoxin R&D
feed.summary: AbbVie is expanding its neurotoxin research and development beyond Botox, aiming to introduce new therapeutic indications and enhance its aesthetics product line. The company is advancing two next-generation neurotoxins, AGN-151607 and TrenibotE, to address high unmet medical needs and reclaim market share in the competitive aesthetics space. This strategic move builds on Botox's established history in both therapeutic and cosmetic applications to secure future growth.

feed.title: RTX unit Raytheon lands $1.7 billion deal to supply Patriot systems to Spain
feed.summary: Raytheon, a unit of RTX, has secured a significant $1.7 billion deal to supply Patriot air defense systems to Spain. This news comes from Reuters, indicating a major international defense contract for the company.

feed.title: Rtx Corp stock hits all-time high at 186.83 USD
feed.summary: RTX Corporation's stock reached an all-time high of $186.83, surpassing its previous 52-week high, following a 62.17% surge over the past year. This achievement is backed by strong investor confidence, strategic initiatives, and recent significant defense contracts for its Raytheon and Collins Aerospace businesses. The company maintains a substantial market capitalization and has a long history of dividend payments, with analysts watching for sustained momentum.

feed.title: Arch Capital Group Ltd stock hits 52-week high at $97.46
feed.summary: Arch Capital Group Ltd's stock reached a new 52-week high of $97.46, reflecting strong investor confidence and a 5.46% 1-year total return. This achievement is supported by impressive revenue growth of 15.87% and a "GREAT" financial health assessment from InvestingPro. The company's robust performance, despite missing revenue expectations in its latest quarter, is further bolstered by an 18% return on equity and active share buybacks.

feed.title: Edwards wins FDA nod for Sapien M3 mitral valve, marking first transseptal transcatheter therapy
feed.summary: Edwards Lifesciences has received FDA approval for its Sapien M3 mitral valve replacement system, the first transcatheter mitral regurgitation therapy to use a transseptal approach. This approval came ahead of schedule and allows the device to treat patients with symptomatic moderate-to-severe or severe MR who are unsuitable for surgery or TEER therapy. The Sapien M3 system, which builds on the proven Sapien platform, also treats symptomatic mitral valve dysfunction associated with mitral annular calcification.

feed.title: Stifel Financial (SF) Valuation Check After Record Client Assets and Optimistic Fourth-Quarter Outlook
feed.summary: Stifel Financial (SF) recently achieved record client assets, with total assets up 8% and fee-based assets up 14% year-over-year, driving significant stock momentum. Despite a 10% one-month share price return and 135.8% three-year total shareholder return, the company's valuation presents a mixed picture. While a narrative fair value suggests a slight 2.8% undervaluation at $132.38, a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model indicates a fair value of $93.16, considerably lower than the current price.

feed.title: New $1,000 'Trump Account' and Schwab match boost kids' nest eggs
feed.summary: Charles Schwab (NYSE: SCHW) has announced it will match the U.S. government's one-time $1,000 contribution to "Trump Accounts" for eligible newborn children of its U.S. employees. These tax-advantaged accounts, established by President Trump's program, aim to promote long-term financial security for children born between 2025 and 2028 by encouraging early saving and investing. Schwab's initiative aligns with its mission to champion financial literacy and empower families to achieve financial goals.

feed.title: Williams-Sonoma (NYSE:WSM) Given New $195.00 Price Target at Evercore ISI
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has raised its price target for Williams-Sonoma (NYSE:WSM) to $195.00 from $190.00, maintaining an "in-line" rating and suggesting a 2.04% upside. This adjustment follows Williams-Sonoma reporting strong quarterly earnings of $1.96 per share and revenue of $1.88 billion, both exceeding analyst expectations. Despite varied individual analyst targets, the consensus remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $198.71.

feed.title: BlackRock stock rating reiterated as Overweight by Morgan Stanley
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has reiterated an "Overweight" rating on BlackRock (NYSE:BLK) with a price target of $1,514.00, suggesting a potential 39% upside. This aligns with a bullish consensus, as InvestingPro data indicates BlackRock is currently trading below its Fair Value. The firm maintains a positive outlook on the world's largest asset manager, which boasts strong financial health, consistent dividend payments for 23 years, and expanding offerings in private markets and technology solutions through its Aladdin platform.

feed.title: Edwards Lifesciences’ SAPIEN M3 becomes first FDA-approved mitral valve system
feed.summary: Edwards Lifesciences has received FDA approval for its SAPIEN M3 mitral valve replacement system, the first transcatheter therapy using a transseptal approach for mitral regurgitation. This approval covers patients unsuitable for surgery or transcatheter edge-to-edge repair and those with mitral valve dysfunction associated with mitral annular calcification. The company is trading near its 52-week high, reflecting investor optimism, and analysts have recently upgraded its stock ratings.

feed.title: The biggest food and beverage M&A deals in 2025
feed.summary: In 2025, the food and beverage industry saw a mix of companies streamlining their portfolios through breakups and others expanding via acquisitions, particularly in health and wellness. Notable deals included Ferrero's purchase of WK Kellogg for $3.1 billion and Mars' $36 billion acquisition of Kellanova, aiming to diversify offerings and reach younger consumers amid sluggish sales. PepsiCo's acquisition of Poppi and Hershey's deal for LesserEvil also highlighted the industry's shift towards better-for-you options.

feed.title: Westwind Capital Decreases Stake in IDEXX Laboratories, Inc. $IDXX
feed.summary: Westwind Capital reduced its stake in IDEXX Laboratories by 31.9% in the third quarter, selling 14,604 shares and holding 31,141 shares valued at $19.9 million. This adjustment makes IDEXX its 9th largest holding, representing 4.1% of its portfolio. Meanwhile, IDEXX beat Q3 estimates, increased revenue by 13.3% year-over-year, and set positive FY2025 guidance.

feed.title: Westwind Capital Takes $13.80 Million Position in Boston Scientific Corporation $BSX
feed.summary: Westwind Capital has acquired a new position in Boston Scientific Corporation, purchasing 141,343 shares valued at approximately $13.80 million, making it their 16th largest holding. Boston Scientific exceeded Q3 expectations with strong earnings and revenue, and the stock is heavily owned by institutional investors. Insiders have recently sold off a significant number of shares.

feed.title: Westwind Capital Acquires New Position in Uber Technologies, Inc. $UBER
feed.summary: Westwind Capital recently acquired a new position in Uber Technologies, Inc., purchasing 159,278 shares valued at approximately $15.6 million, making it their 14th largest holding. This investment comes as Uber reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and carries a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts. However, the company faces mixed news flow, including positive developments with robotaxi trials and negative sentiment from a New York Times investigation into background-check failures.

feed.title: SLB receives five-year Aramco contract for unconventional gas field services
feed.summary: SLB has secured a five-year contract from Aramco to provide services for an unconventional gas field. This news comes from Reuters and is presented as a headline only, without further detailed text. The contract underscores SLB's ongoing involvement in major energy projects.

feed.title: SLB wins five-year stimulation contract from Aramco for Saudi gas fields By Investing.com
feed.summary: SLB has secured a five-year contract from Aramco to provide stimulation services for Saudi Arabia’s unconventional gas fields. This agreement includes advanced stimulation, well intervention, frac automation, and digital solutions, supporting Saudi Arabia's Vision 2030 to diversify its energy portfolio and expand natural gas production. The contract is part of a larger multi-billion dollar initiative to develop the Kingdom's unconventional gas resources.

feed.title: Yousif Capital Management LLC Has $27.82 Million Position in McDonald's Corporation $MCD
feed.summary: Yousif Capital Management LLC recently decreased its stake in McDonald's Corporation (NYSE: MCD) by 5.6% in the third quarter, holding 91,535 shares valued at $27.82 million. Despite a recent dividend increase, McDonald's missed EPS estimates, and analysts currently rate the stock as a "Hold" with an average price target of $324.57. Insider selling also occurred, with executives selling a significant number of shares.

feed.title: NBA Champion Jalen Williams Joins Forces With Paycom
feed.summary: Paycom Software, Inc. announced a new multiyear partnership with NBA champion Jalen (JDub) Williams. Williams will star in Paycom's "Answers" campaign, promoting its AI engine, IWant, with commercials debuting during nationally televised NBA games on Christmas Day. The collaboration highlights Williams's positive energy and championship mindset, aligning him with Paycom’s innovative technology.

feed.title: Citigroup or Bank of America: Which Big Bank is the Better 2026 Bet?
feed.summary: This article compares Citigroup (C) and Bank of America (BAC) to determine which is a better investment heading into 2026. While Bank of America offers stable growth with a strong U.S. presence, Citigroup's ongoing transformation, global focus, aggressive cost-cutting, and higher expected earnings growth position it for better profitability and upside potential. The article highlights C's lower valuation and superior recent price performance as key advantages.

feed.title: Parnassus Core Equity Fund Sold Intuit (INTU) After Share Price Appreciation
feed.summary: Parnassus Investments' Core Equity Fund sold its position in Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ: INTU) during the third quarter of 2025, after significant share price appreciation. The fund aimed to lock in gains and reallocate capital to higher-conviction and more defensive positions, including Salesforce and Workday. Despite Intuit's strong performance, Parnassus believes certain AI stocks offer greater potential for higher returns in a shorter timeframe.

feed.title: BD faces hernia mesh lawsuit from Tela Bio
feed.summary: Tela Bio has filed a lawsuit against BD, alleging anti-competitive practices in the U.S. surgical hernia mesh market. Tela Bio claims BD used its market dominance to exclude Tela's OviTex offering and punished hospitals for purchasing Tela's products through long-term contracts. This lawsuit builds on BD's history of legal challenges related to its hernia mesh devices, although the company continues to dispute allegations and produce mesh products.

feed.title: Key Petrobras field hits output pace equivalent to 1 million bpd, sources says
feed.summary: Petrobras' Tupi field briefly reached a production pace equal to 1 million barrels per day this week, according to sources. This milestone suggests the field is on track to return to 1 million bpd output, a level previously not expected until 2027 by the state-run company. Achieving this sustained production would exceed current daily averages by over 200,000 bpd.

feed.title: RTX's Raytheon awarded $1.7 billion contract to deliver four Patriot fire units to Spain
feed.summary: Raytheon, an RTX business, has secured a $1.7 billion contract to provide Spain with four Patriot air and missile defense systems. This foreign military sales agreement includes radars, launchers, command and control stations, and training equipment, marking Spain's largest Patriot order to date. The deal aims to modernize Spain's air and missile defense capabilities and enhance its readiness against evolving threats.

feed.title: Eric Sprott Announces Changes to His Holdings in Strikepoint Gold Inc.
feed.summary: Eric Sprott announced a donation of 2,984,200 common shares of Strikepoint Gold Inc. to The Sprott Foundation on December 22, 2025. This transaction decreased his beneficial ownership to below 10% on a partially diluted basis, causing him to cease being an insider of the company. Despite the donation, Mr. Sprott still controls these shares and maintains a long-term investment view, with potential for future acquisitions or dispositions.

feed.title: MAX S&P 500 4x Leveraged ETN ETF Price, Holdings, & News (NYSEARCA:SPYU)
feed.summary: The MAX S&P 500 4x Leveraged ETN (SPYU) is an exchange-traded note that tracks 4x the daily performance of a total return index comprised of US large-cap companies. Launched on December 7, 2023, SPYU has seen its stock increase by 20.3% this year, trading at $56.23. The ETN has an expense ratio of 0.95% and assets under management totaling $302.05 million.

feed.title: Check out MAX S&P 500 4X Leveraged ETN's stock price (SPYU) in real time
feed.summary: This article provides real-time stock price and financial data for the MAX S&P 500 4X Leveraged ETN (SPYU). It details the current stock price, volume, 52-week range, and other key financial statistics. Additionally, it lists recent news and related events, including information about the Bank of Montreal from affiliate sources.

feed.title: Best World ETFs
feed.summary: This article discusses the benefits and risks of investing in World ETFs, which are exchange-traded funds tracking broadly diversified global indices. It highlights Vanguard's Total World Stock Index Fund ETF (VT) and iShares' MSCI ACWI ETF (ACWI) as top choices, providing a comparison of their key features. The piece also explains how to choose the best World ETFs to align with investment goals and risk tolerance.

feed.title: Scilex Holding Company Confirms Dream Bowl 2026 Meme Coin Claim Process on December 24, 2025 Drop by Datavault AI Inc.
feed.summary: Scilex Holding Company confirmed the claim process for its Dream Bowl 2026 Meme Coin, which will be accessible to eligible shareholders from December 24, 2025. This meme coin, developed with Datavault AI's blockchain technology, integrates sports, digital assets, and shareholder benefits. Shareholders as of November 25, 2025, can claim their tokens via the designated website, representing an innovative approach to shareholder engagement.

feed.title: Ovintiv outlines progress on NuVista Energy acquisition in new SEC filing
feed.summary: Ovintiv Inc. has provided an update on its planned acquisition of NuVista Energy Ltd., a transaction involving both stock and cash expected to close by the end of Q1 2026. NuVista has begun mailing management information circulars and proxy statements to its shareholders, detailing pro forma financial information for Ovintiv. The acquisition is subject to shareholder, regulatory, and court approvals, and has been met with positive analyst ratings due to its potential to enhance Ovintiv's productivity.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Riley Exploration Permian (NYSE:REPX) CEO Sells 20,000 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Riley Exploration Permian's CEO, Bobby Riley, sold 20,000 shares of the company's stock for over $518,000, reducing his stake by 5.41%. This occurred amid the company's approval of a $100 million share repurchase program and an increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.40, indicating potential undervaluation and financial health. The stock has seen mixed analyst ratings recently, with an average "Buy" recommendation.

feed.title: Medicare to pay $300 for Biomerica’s IBS test starting January 2026
feed.summary: The Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) has set a $300 national payment rate for Biomerica Inc.’s inFoods IBS test, effective January 1, 2026. This decision follows AMA approval of a unique CPT code for the test, which identifies patient-specific food triggers for irritable bowel syndrome. Biomerica plans to leverage this CMS benchmark in negotiations with private insurers, potentially increasing access for the significant portion of Medicare beneficiaries suffering from IBS.

feed.title: Voya Investment Management LLC Sells 44,898 Shares of Travel + Leisure Co. $TNL
feed.summary: Voya Investment Management LLC reduced its stake in Travel + Leisure Co. by 16.5% in Q3, selling 44,898 shares and retaining 227,440 shares valued at approximately $13.53 million. This comes amidst significant insider selling, with insiders offloading 198,776 shares worth about $13.08 million in the past three months. Despite this, institutional investors hold 87.54% of the stock, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a $72.22 price target.

feed.title: Truist announces fourth quarter 2025 earnings call details
feed.summary: Truist Financial Corporation will report its fourth quarter 2025 financial results on Wednesday, January 21, 2026, before the market opens. Chairman and CEO Bill Rogers and CFO Mike Maguire will host a conference call at 8 a.m. ET to discuss the results. Investors can access the call via webcast or dial-in, with presentation materials available on the Truist investor relations website.

feed.title: Yousif Capital Management LLC Has $28.26 Million Stock Position in AT&T Inc. $T
feed.summary: Yousif Capital Management LLC reduced its stake in AT&T Inc. by 5.2% during Q3, retaining 1,000,688 shares valued at $28.26 million. Meanwhile, other institutional investors like Vanguard Group Inc. and State Street Corp. increased their holdings significantly. AT&T recently announced a quarterly dividend of $0.2775, translating to an annualized dividend of $1.11 and a yield of approximately 4.6%.

feed.title: Synopsys, Inc. Sued for Securities Law Violations - Investors Should Contact Levi & Korsinsky Before December 30, 2025 to Discuss Your Rights - SNPS
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has filed a class action securities lawsuit against Synopsys, Inc. (NASDAQ: SNPS), alleging the company made false statements and concealed issues regarding its Design IP business and the impact of its focus on AI customers. Investors who suffered losses between December 4, 2024, and September 9, 2025, are encouraged to contact the firm before December 30, 2025, to discuss their rights and potential compensation without out-of-pocket costs.

feed.title: Voya Investment Management LLC Cuts Stock Position in Phillips 66 $PSX
feed.summary: Voya Investment Management LLC has reduced its stake in Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) by 16.1% during the third quarter, selling 20,754 shares. Despite this, other institutional investors like Elliott Investment Management and Vanguard Group increased their holdings, leading to institutional ownership of 76.93%. Phillips 66 exceeded Q3 earnings expectations and offers a quarterly dividend of $1.20, although its payout ratio is high at 131.15%.

feed.title: Lamb Weston upholds guidance but disappoints investors
feed.summary: Lamb Weston Holdings Inc. saw its stock sink 26% after reaffirming its fiscal 2026 earnings guidance, contrary to investor expectations for an upside revision. The company maintained its full-year net sales and adjusted EBITDA outlook, citing price/mix dynamics and higher manufacturing costs, particularly in its International segment. Analysts noted significant market disappointment, with concerns rising about potential future profit deceleration given the competitive environment.
